column3:
The purpose of this spreadsheet is to *try* map every stellaris potrait to other potraits to open up trait diversity.
This is both for the purpose of build diversity, a species will be able to access both categories of exclusive traits.
And additionally when it comes to lithoids and thermophiles branch out a subset of potraits into more categories to play as other Primary species (IE thermophile portrait as organic.)

Common, Cybernetic+Synthetic and Biogensis will be getting new traits. So no matter what every species gets access to atleast 2 categories.
